title: Notification No.11/2016-Cus(NT), dated 12.01.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 11/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 12th January, 2016 S.O.(E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General(Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the officers mentioned in column (3) of the Table below in respect of the cases mentioned in column (2) of the said Table for the purpose of adjudication of the show cause notices mentioned therein, namely:- Table Sl. No. Show Cause Notice No. Answerable to (1) (2) (3) 1.
